prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on O₂ (dioxygen) performed at DFT tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fitted RI, PySCF UKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, single-point (not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. HOMO energy = −8.8739616 eV (degenerate, indices 14 & 15, consistent with π*g SOMOs of triplet O₂). LUMO energy = −3.5859031 eV (degenerate, indices 16 & 17). Headline HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV. Total electronic energy = −150.38872 Hartree. Koopmans-theorem vertical IP = 8.8739616 eV; vertical EA = 3.5859031 eV. Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.
